name: sw-design-system-guide
description: SW Design System Guide — SW UX GUIDE V2.4

scripts.build: npm run reports:sync && npm run build:bundle
scripts.installer:build: D=$(date +%y%m%d) && sed -i '' -E "s|(FOUNDATION_COLLECTION = \"Foundation V2 )[0-9]+\"|\1${D}\"|; s|(SEMANTIC_COLLECTION   = \"Semantic V2 )[0-9]+\"|\1${D}\"|" plugins/figma-vars-installer/src/vars-data.ts && esbuild plugins/figma-vars-installer/src/code.ts --bundle --outfile=plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/code.js --target=es2017 --platform=browser && zip -j assets/downloads/s1-design-vars-installer.zip plugins/figma-vars-installer/manifest.json plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/code.js plugins/figma-vars-installer/src/ui.html
scripts.figma:usage:apply: npm run figma:usage:check && node scripts/figma/apply-figma-usage.mjs && npm run reports:sync && npm run reports:check
